transcript: Speaker A: Hello, what is your name? Speaker B: My name is Rahul. Speaker A: How old are you? Speaker B: I have 22. Speaker A: 'I have 22' nahi, 'I am 22 years old' hota hai. ['I have 22' no, it is 'I am 22 years old'.] Speaker B: Okay, okay. I am 22 years old. Speaker A: Where are you from? Speaker B: I am Uttar Pradesh. Speaker A: 'I am Uttar Pradesh' nahi, 'I am from Uttar Pradesh' hoga. ['I am Uttar Pradesh' no, it will be 'I am from Uttar Pradesh'.] Speaker B: Oh... theek hai, theek hai. Mujhe English acche se nahi aati. [Oh... okay, okay. I don't know English very well.] Speaker A: Koi problem nahi. AI teachers try kiya? [No problem. Did you try AI teachers?] Speaker B: Woh toh mehnge hote honge na? [They must be expensive, right?] Speaker A: Bilkul nahi. Normal English classes se 7 guna sasta hai. Isiliye 50 lakh log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker B: Par time nahi milta. [But I don't get time.] Speaker A: Roz ki sirf 15-20 minute ki practice kaafi hai. Bilkul confident ho jaoge. [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.] Speaker B: Wow, kaise join karu? [Wow, how do I join?] Speaker A: Yeh install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. Sirf 15 dino mein tumhe improvement dikhne lagegi. Chalo, shuru ho jao. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. In just 15 days, you will start seeing improvement. Come on, get started.] Speaker C: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: what is your name; My name is Rahul; How old are you?; I have 22; I am 22 yrs old; Okay okay; I am 22 years old; Where are you from?; I am Uttar Pradesh; I am from Uttar Pradesh; Ohh... theek hai [Ohh... okay]; Mujhe English [Me English]; aati [know]; Koi problem nahi [No problem]; AI teachers try; hote honge na [must be, right]; Bilkul nahi [Not at all]; classes se 7 guna [7 times than classes]; 7X CHEAPER; MySivi AI English Speakin...; MySivi AI; Install; 5M+ Downloads; Sivi is now MySivi; Improve English speaking with AI; Par time nahi [But no time]; Roz ki sirf 15-20 [Daily just 15-20]; ho jaoge [will become]; Wow, kaise [Wow, how]; Install; MySivi AI English Speakin...; Installing...; Master Spoken Eng; Sharpen your Englis 1-on-1 calls. Try MySivi fast; Sirf 15 dino mein [In just 15 days]; tumhe improvement [you improvement]; Shuru ho jao [Get started]; MySivi English speaking app; Install Now
summary: A man struggles with basic English grammar while speaking to an AI robot in a desert. The robot introduces the MySivi app as an affordable, quick daily solution to practice English. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app for visible improvement in 15 days.
